title: Sit down twice
description: Sit down wherever you want! Press sneak twice and you're sitting down. It's that easy. Works with the vanilla version.
body:
# Sit down twice!
Sit on stairs and slabs, in sit anywhere you like!

## ⚙️ Server side!
If you only install this datapack on your server/LAN, it will work for everyone else without them needing to install it!

## 📖 Instructions:
Press sneak twice and you're sitting down! :D

To sit on a slab or on stairs, just stand on it and Press sneak twice. As simple as that.

## ⤵️ Installation:
Datapack:
Download the latest release and put the datapack .zip file into the datapacks folder of your Minecraft world.
##
[Discord](https://discord.gg/zRcv4h64bm)
